arts.ttl: ‘He’s one of the best in the world’ – Liverpool’s Alisson full of praise for Mike Maignan
arts.sum: Ahead of AC Milan’s UEFA Champions League encounter against Liverpool, Alisson (31) was full of praise for his opposite number Mike Maignan (29). Since joining AC Milan from Lille OSC…

arts.ttl: Pulisic looking to extend superb record against Liverpool
arts.sum: Now in his second season with AC Milan, the upcoming match against Liverpool will be his seventh appearance for the club in the competition, where he’ll be looking to score his third goal for the Rossoneri . During his time at Chelsea, he faced Liverpool six times, scoring two goals and providing two assists in Premier League and European Super Cup matches.
